# `api.lookup.get_countries`

> `GET /lookup/countries` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.lookup.get_countries() -> list[CountryCodeDto]
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab lookup get_countries
```

GET /lookup/countries

## Response

Returns a list of `List[CountryCodeDto]`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `code` | `Optional[str]` | no | ISO country code |
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Country name |
| `id` | `Optional[str]` | no | Country UUID |
| `iataCode` | `Optional[str]` | no | IATA country code |
